purpose: Bundled compact model checkpoints and evaluation shards used by the current paper-critical all-dataset strict five-path replay runner.
policy: These compact artifacts are included in the anonymous code-and-data package. Full raw datasets and full-scale regenerated training products remain external. A complete rerun should verify matching hashes or rerun the documented training/data generation pipeline.

artifact_groups.name: generalization_paper_benchmark_full_run_id
artifact_groups.regen_command: conda activate cudadev; python -c "from p2cccd.bench.generalization_paper_benchmark import GeneralizationPaperBenchmarkConfig, run_generalization_paper_benchmark; run_generalization_paper_benchmark(GeneralizationPaperBenchmarkConfig(run_name='generalization_paper_benchmark_full_run_id'))"
artifact_groups.download_or_regen: Restore exact hashes from an artifact bundle if available; otherwise regenerate from local source datasets.
artifact_groups.expected_cost: GPU training plus multi-source dense/query replay; hours on a CUDA workstation.

artifact_groups.name: fusion360_full_large_training_run_id
artifact_groups.download_or_regen: Requires restored Fusion360 Gallery extraction or equivalent local dataset root.
artifact_groups.expected_cost: GPU training plus dense evaluation; hours depending on dataset storage speed.

artifact_groups.name: common_modeling_high_density_scenarios_large_run_id
artifact_groups.regen_command: conda activate cudadev; python -m p2cccd.bench.common_modeling_high_density_scenarios; python -m p2cccd.bench.tight_inclusion_stpf_training --shards src\datasets\training\common_modeling_high_density\shards\common_modeling_high_density_scenarios_large_run_id --run-name common_modeling_high_density_scenarios_large_run_id_medium_mlp_10epoch --report-name common_modeling_high_density_scenarios_large_run_id_medium_mlp_10epoch --epochs 10 --batch-size 65536 --device cuda
artifact_groups.download_or_regen: Prefer restoring exact hashes; regeneration may require matching the large high-density scenario config.

artifact_groups.name: rtstpf_advantage_cases_v4_large_training_run_id
artifact_groups.download_or_regen: Requires the Fusion360/full and generated advantage-case inputs present locally.
artifact_groups.expected_cost: GPU training plus ORT/TensorRT probe when configured; hours.

artifact_groups.name: shapenet_ood_dense_cases_run_id
artifact_groups.download_or_regen: Requires restored ShapeNetCore-derived local assets and the upstream advantage-case checkpoint.
artifact_groups.expected_cost: GPU training/evaluation plus local mesh preprocessing; hours.

artifact_groups.name: car_wall_impact_dense_wall_patch_rtstpf_training_benchmark_run_id
artifact_groups.download_or_regen: Can be regenerated from the analytic car-wall case and local generated visualization inputs.
artifact_groups.expected_cost: GPU training; typically shorter than full multi-dataset runs.

artifact_groups.name: common_daily_physics_collision_cases_run_id
artifact_groups.generated_by: internal daily-physics generator omitted from public release
artifact_groups.regen_command: restore matching shard by hash or regenerate from an equivalent local daily-physics generator
artifact_groups.download_or_regen: Restore exact shard hashes when available; otherwise regenerate from a local daily-physics source with the same schema.
artifact_groups.expected_cost: CPU/GPU smoke-to-full cost depends on the local generator and hardware.
